_note: Canonical player list. 'aliases' = every spelling that appears in the workbooks. Grows as each year is extracted. Ryan reviews each addition.

players.name: Big Gay Al
players.note: One-time stand-in, 2005 only; real name unknown. NOT Roy Hoenisch (Ryan re-confirmed 2026-07-02).

players.name: Roy Hoenisch
players.note: Joined 2006, replacing the 2005 stand-in 'Big Gay Al' — went by 'Big Gay Roy' as a joke about that. Different person from Big Gay Al AND from Loyd. Ryan confirmed 2026-07-04: 'BGR' in 2020-21 = Roy (back after 2011). (In 2013-2016 sheets, 'Roy'/'BGR' shorthand meant Loyd via per-year overrides.)

players.name: Billy
players.note: 'Brother Billy'. First appears 2007 (1 round), full trips from 2009. Full name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: Loyd
players.note: 'Big Gay' is an evolving joke name (cf. Big Gay Al 2005, Big Gay Roy/Roy Hoenisch 2006+). Ryan CONFIRMED (twice, latest 2026-07-04): Loyd and Roy Hoenisch are different people — do not merge, do not re-ask. The 2013 Mist-Weed sheet calling him 'Roy' is a naming slip. Full name TBD.

players.name: Cookie AC Milan
players.note: NEW in 2014. Real name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: T-Dog Hitman
players.note: NEW in 2014. Real name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: Craig
players.note: NEW in 2007. Last name unknown, Ryan to identify. 'Knees' in the 2008 Myrtle Cup doc.

players.name: Irv
players.note: NEW in 2007. Full name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: Deadman
players.note: NOT A REAL PLAYER. 2016 placeholder for the missing 12th man (11-player trip, Ryan confirmed 2026-07-04). Kept for Mist-Weed match records ('<carrier> (DM)' rows); excluded from the 2016 leaderboard. Site should exclude phantom players from rosters.

players.name: Jeff
players.note: NEW in 2016. Last name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: Troy
players.note: NEW in 2016. Last name unknown, Ryan to identify.

players.name: Jimmy B
players.note: NEW in 2018 (Ocean City era). Last name unknown, Ryan to identify. Didn't play Mist-Weed 2018.

players.name: Joe Dueh
players.note: Ryan confirmed 2026-07-02: 'Dueh, Jr.' (2004) is the same person as Joe Dueh.

players.name: Dan Shelbo Sr.
players.note: 'Shelbo'. A 'Shelbo Jr.' appears in later years (his son) — keep distinct.

players.name: Matt
players.note: NEW in 2020. Last name unknown, Ryan to identify. 2021 champion.

players.name: Kevin Burke

players.name: Ryan Fowler

players.name: Scotty H
